emails.subject: Re: Koch Metals
emails.body: Re: Koch Metals This Koch trade you sent me is a London based Credit counterparty, not a Houston counterparty so I have no information on it. You are going to have to resolve this with London Legal, Edmund Cooper who is an attorney in London at 011 44 20 7783 5382.
